title: Create: Whimsy Wheels
description: A create addon, with kinetical blocks capable of transmitting su by calibration, even seperated by walls
body:
![Image Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LDWQotJr/images/eed9c1785341ba7578681ca61df865f2863c3d4b.png)

## Mod Description

This mod is an addon for the create mod that adds some random features, with 7 blocks related to kinetics currently added. Some of them can generate kinetic power, while other is related to noteblocks.

**Noteblock Encased Shaft**

- Transfers rotational power in a straight line along its axis.

**Noteblock Encased Cogwheel**

- Transfers rotational power and allows for perpendicular kinetic connections and gear ratio changes.

**Brass Noteblock Encased Shaft**

- Automatically plays musical notes, with the pitch dynamically determined by the input rotation speed.

- Allows players to adjust the audio volume using a scrollable UI box on the outer casing faces.

- Displays detailed block data (Kinetic Stress/Speed, Musical Note, Frequency, and Volume percentage) when viewed with Engineer's Goggles.

- Wirelessly transmits rotational power to another identical Brass Noteblock up to 4 blocks away along the same axis.

- Dynamically calculates the gear ratio of the wireless kinetic connection based on the difference in volume settings between the sending and receiving blocks.

**Kinetic Sculk Sensor**

- Detects vibrations while remaining completely safe to move on dynamic Create contraptions (like moving trains or spinning bearings).

- Dynamically emits light when actively detecting a vibration.

## 模组介绍

**音符盒封装传动轴 (Noteblock Encased Cogwheel)**

- 沿着其轴线呈直线传输转动效能。

**音符盒封装齿轮 (Noteblock Encased Cogwheel)**

- 传输转动效能，并允许进行垂直的动力连接和传动比更改。

**黄铜音符盒封装轴 (Brass Noteblock Encased Shaft)**

- 自动播放音符，其音高由输入的转动速度动态决定。
- 允许玩家通过外壳面上的滚动 UI 框来调节音频音量。
- 当佩戴工程师护目镜观察时，显示详细的方块数据（动力应力/转速、音符、频率以及音量百分比）。
- 在同一轴线上，可将转动效能无线传输到最远 4 格外的另一个相同黄铜音符盒。
- 根据发送端和接收端方块之间的音量设置差异，动态计算无线动力连接的传动比。

**动力幽匿感测体 (Kinetic Sculk Sensor)**

- 探测振动，同时在机械动力 (Create) 移动组件（如移动的火车或旋转的轴承）上保持绝对安全。
- 在积极探测到振动时动态发出光亮。


## My Modding Tutorial

### 中文版本

- 在**教程**的帮助下，你也能编写自己的**机械动力 (Create Mod) 附属模组**。
- 本模组是我的**个人教程模组**，其中的所有内容均在课程中**逐步完成**。
- 你可以在 **B站 (Bilibili)** 找到我的**完全免费教程**；目前已发布 **12 期**，每期时长约 **10–30 分钟**。
- 该系列提供了从零开始开发附属模组的**详细指南**，涵盖了**方块注册**、**创建动力方块**以及**机械动力风格渲染**等主题。
- 只要你具备一定的 **Java 基础**和**标准 Minecraft 模组开发**知识，即可开始学习。

我的B站账号：[UP主的账号首页](https://space.bilibili.com/3690980207233484?spm_id_from=333.788.0.0)

---

### English Version

- With the help of this **tutorial**, you too can write your own **addons for the Create Mod**.
- This is my **personal tutorial mod**, where everything inside was completed **step-by-step** during my lessons.
- You can find my **completely free tutorials** on **Bilibili**; there are currently **12 episodes** available, each lasting about **10–30 minutes**.
- The series provides a **detailed, step-by-step guide** on how to develop a Create addon from scratch, covering topics like **block registration**, **creating kinetic blocks**, and **Create-style rendering**.
- As long as you have some knowledge of **Java** and **standard Minecraft mod development**, you’re ready to start learning.
- English version will be soon available(maybe)
